TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Chile, title = Chile, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chile} }

S.FORM: Chile Chile Chile Chile kapulungan a kanatal "Spain a kamu u Rep√ļblica de Chile" ngangan tu Chile , u nutimulan a Amilikan a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ChileśôļŚą©ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Chile), .) u siwkay nu kanatal u Chile sa i labu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 30 00 S, 71 00 W u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 756,102 km2 u ahebal nu lalaay sa izaw ku 743,812 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 12,290 km2 hamin nu tademawan sa 17,650,114. kakalukan umah sa 21.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 21.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 57%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Santiago . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 18 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Sebasti√°n Pi√Īera (SaypasetianÔľéPiniyela Ś°ěŚ∑īśĖĮŤíāŚģČ¬∑Áöģś∂ÖśčČ), 12 bulad 1 demiad 1949 a mihca nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Chile ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihca 3 bulad 11 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Chile sa, u semilaway, u salengacay atu sumanahay. si salengacay a bunac i pabaw nu hata. Chile Chile kapulungan a kanatal "Spain a kamu u Rep√ļblica de Chile" ngangan tu Chile , u nutimulan a Amilika a kanatal. satipan u Chile atu timulan micapi waliyu nuwamisan micapi tu Peru , nuwalian micapi tu Bolivia ŚŹäArgentina . u nian a kanatal nutimulan a Amilikan a sakaput a kanatal, i nutimulan a Amilikan atu Argentina atu Brazil palecat "ABC icelayay a kanatal", caay kunian dada' , Chile atu Ecuador caay kahiza atu Brazil madatulas tu nutimulan a Amilikan a kanatal. (u sulit nu hulam: ChileśôļŚą©ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Chile), "ABCŚľ∑Śúč". .) Chile a kakitizaan i tini satimulan tu nu Amilikan a talu atu Nan-ciy-zuw uyza silaet dada' tu De-ley-ke a bayuan masapauwan, i kitakit u sakatimulanay a kanatal, pakay tu nu Nan-ciy-zuw a sakuwan caay ka saasip kunilalabu ,satu Chile a tademaw hinasakamu tuni uzipay a kanatal, " u sabataday nu hekal a kanatal" u tadamaw nu Chile pakala tu 1,800 mang, u nikasabinacadan u salengacay a tademaw katuud ku malamelay tu nu zumaay a binacadan, atu malecad tu zumaay Argentina a kanatal, nayay ku nu Africa a iluc a tademaw, u zuma u nianay tu yincumin atu cayay kakatuud a binacadan malecad tu kakatuud. (u sulit nu hulam: .) Chile a cacudadan talakaw macakat kunipasubana', atu pasubana' tu ni tineng atu singmung atu macakatay a kanatal, palatatenga' tuni u tineng atu mutesek tu tineng a kanatal, Chile i sakaku sanay a sinbung u ni kacakat u ni sasulitan kabuwah nu tedamaw, amin a kacakat, u ni pasilut tu ngangan, maala tu satalakaway atu nutimulan a Europe a kanatal masapaseneng tu salunganay, i tini i sakayay Chile u macakatay ku cin-ci tu nuamisan a Amilikan atu Europe a kanatal, tuynian katuud ku mabulaway a iluiluc nu Asia miawas tu waliyu mabulaw mueneng i Chile . (u sulit nu hulam: .) kamu nu cacudadan Si-ban-ya a dademaw Di-ke-de-luo-sa-lay-si a cudad izaw ku Chile a ngngan ,I tizaay a tademaw Indian a binacadan Ke-ciu-ya a kamu makay Incas a ngangan, sakamu sa kuheni "Chi-le" u kasinenawan a ngangan. u ngangan nu Chile hakay namakay i Yin-ciy-zen a tademaw, u imi sa, hadikuc nu Di-siw atu kanuma. (u sulit nu hulam: Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôšļļŤŅ≠śąą¬∑Śĺ∑¬∑ "Chile" "śąĖ"śĶ∑ť∑ó") Chile yadah kuni u lalaculan tu Kang-can buyubuyu'an u lalaculan atu mibutingay a lalaculan, Chile i kitakitan u Tung-kang a lalaculan u sayadahay nu kanatal, i kitakitan sayadahay nu kanatal ni patahekalan tu Tung si nganagn tu u kapahay a nganagn" Tung-kang a Hung-ti a kanatal", u zumasatu i lalabuay nu kanatal A-ta-ka-ma-sa-mu u sakakeladay i kitakit, uyni satu Chile uyza aca I kitakit uyzayamin nu tahakay yamin a sanicaway a Siaw-se-cuang a kanatal. saazihan tu laylay nu Chile nu amisan nu Chile i Spain mialaay katukuh I ayaw u tungusay nu In-ciy-di-ku ,namakay kasumamadan tu 16 a mihcaan, mulakal ku Spain a tademaw malingatu miala tu Chile 1541 a mihcaan patizeng tu tuze ku Sen-ti-ya-ke , tumulay a Ma-pu-ciye a tademaw saicelang sa mipacuy tu Spain a tademaw nu micumuday i tini katukuh i kasasumamadan tu 19 a mihcaan, kya mala u tungusay tu nu Chile a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) piazihan tulala' nu hekal Chile nu timulan nuwamisan a laet pakala tu 4,300 km, i tini An-di-se a buyu'an atu waliyu a bayuan, palalecal tu nu walian satipan a salaet 200 km dada' "u saahebalay pakala tu 400 km dada'", uynian a lala' nu kanatal azihan samapepet, mala u i kitakitay yamin u masatanayaay a kanatal, satu izaw kungangan kan lamaymay sanay kunipangangan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: "ÁĶ≤Śł∂Śúč"Á®ĪŤôü.) Chile malatulu a kenis : nuwamisan yadah ku buyu' yadah ku masaungcuyay buyu' pakala tu 6,000 a beti', i An-di-se-san-may a buyu'an tusa ku masakululay a buyu'an u tabukan nu A-ta-ka-ma a likelikenan, kuyni u masaacakay a kakitizaan nu kitakit,. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ) tepanay nu kanatal, u demiad mahiza u nu bayu'an a bali, uynian a kenis sidamek ku lala', katuud ku tademaw u kahenulan a tuse Sen-di-ya-ke "pakala tu 650 a mang ku nuenengay a tademaw i tini satusa izaw henay Wa-le-pa-lay-suo "i minatu nuenengay a tademaw pakala tu 280,000 ztu Kang-say-pa-si-weng " u tapang nu saupu nu kusi atu malukay akawaw i tiza nuengenay a tatemaw 50,000 u kahenulan a tusz. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) nutimulan satu caay kakatuud ku tademaw nikahina udad tabaki ku bali hina sawsawni makeleng, ayaw nu dadipasan yadah ku subal tu manganiway adihep. (u kamu nuHulam sa: .) makay satipan pasayza i sawalian saayaway u ma likecu a dadipasan, satu u buyu'an, satusa usaahebalay a buyu', I tepanay uyni u talakaway a buyu', sidabek kapah apalumaan atu pahutinan Chile atu Bolivia atu Argentina tu lilies nu kanatal u An-di-se-san-may a buyu'an u nuwali kulul a buyu'. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) kanahatu i Tay-ping-yanh I tepan izaw ku Hu-an-biy-bil-nan-an-sung-daw atu bu-huo-cun-daw u nu Chile a subal. cacay a bihcaan a cudad I Chile a nu amisan a An-tuo-pa-ciy-se-ta u 12.7 a haw-mi, i Sen-di-ya-ke 375 haw-mi, iI nutimulan Hu-di-daw 5,800 haw-mi. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 5800śĮęÁĪ≥. makaysatipan pasayza katukuh i walian saayaway u tanaya'ay u likecuay a dadipasan, satu u buyubuyu'ay, satu u ahebalay a buyubuyu'an. i tepan u talakaway u sakapahay a lala',taneng maluk atu u pahutinan. Chile atu Bu-li-wey-ya atu Argentina i lilies nu A-ti-se-san-may nu walian a buyu'. kanahatu i Tay-ping-yanh I tepan izaw ku Hu-an-biy-bil-nan-an-sung-daw atu bu-huo-cun-daw u nu Chile a subal. cacay a bihcaan a cudad I Chile a nu amisan a An-tuo-pa-ciy-se-ta u 12.7 a haw-mi, i Sen-di-ya-ke 375 haw-mi, iI nutimulan Hu-di-daw 5,800 haw-mi. pisupet tu lalangawan Chile pisupet tu lalangawan mala nu Europe mabulaway nu a tademaw nu babalaki pulung tu lisin nu Ing-ti-an a tademaw, misulup tu nuwamisan a Amilikan a liain, satu Chile alalangawan caay kalecat nu tu kasakitakit a lalangawan nikamisengisengi aca. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) demiad maawas ku 38 wiy-du ku lala', icay icuwacuwaay a kakitizaan a caay kalecad kudemiad uyni a kanatal mibalat maawas tu 38 wiy-du, satu ku icuwacuwaay a kakitizaan caay kalecad ku lala', Chile pasuyadah masazumaay a wayway nu bali, cay ku sasakamuan mahiniay a demiad nu Chile a kanadal. 2012 a mihcaan Chile a tademaw izaw ku 16,341,929 a tademaw, uyzasa 1990 a mihcaan a zitayan a nilecuhan caay tu kakatuud, Chile a tademaw u nikacunus mahizatu caay kakatuud ku tademaw, paliayaw tu 2050 a mihcaanay a tademaw a tangasa tu 2,020 a bang,satusa a tahekal a tademaw caay tu kacunus ku tademaw. Chile u katuuday a binacadan a siykay, patinaku tu mahiniay a kitakit kuuday a kitakitay a tademaw yadahay a kitakitay a micumutay a tademaw izaw kuŚćįÁ¨¨ŚģČšļļ atu nu canacananan a malamelay a izang a nisakaputan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: śôļŚą© u sulit nu Lipun: „ÉĀ„É™ŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilika: Chile

(u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: "***"**.) ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu a k…ônis : nuwamisan jadańß ku buju Ē~ ° jadańß ku masauŇč ¶ujaj buju Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** a b…ôti Ē~ °, i an-di-s…ô-san-maj a buju Ē~ °an tusa ku masakur~…ĺur~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ °an u tabukan nu a-ta-ka-ma a r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan, kujni u masaa ¶akaj a kakitizaan nu kitakit,. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ) t…ôpanaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, u d…ômiad mańßiza u nu baju Ē~ °an a bar~…ĺi, ujnian a k…ônis sidam…ôk ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, katuud ku tad…ômaw u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tus…ô s…ôn-di-ja-k…ô "pakar~…ĺa tu *** a maŇč ku nu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw i tini satusa izaw ńß…ônaj wa-r~…ĺ…ô-pa-r~…ĺaj-suo "i minatu nu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ***,*** ztu kaŇč-saj-pa-si-w…ôŇč " u tapaŇč nu saupu nu kusi atu mar~…ĺukaj akawaw i tiza nu…ôŇč…ônaj a tat…ômaw **,*** u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tusz. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) nutimur~…ĺan satu ¶aaj kakatuud ku tad…ômaw nikańßina udad tabaki ku bar~…ĺi ńßina sawsawni mak…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč, ajaw nu dadipasan jadańß ku subar~…ĺ tu maŇčaniwaj adińß…ôp. (u kamu nuńßur~…ĺam sa: .) makaj satipan pasajza i sawar~…ĺian saajawaj u ma r~…ĺik…ô ¶u a dadipasan, satu u buju Ē~ °an, satusa usaańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôpanaj ujni u tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, sidab…ôk kapańß apar~…ĺumaan atu pańßutinan ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô atu bor~…ĺi*ia atu arg…ôntina tu r~…ĺir~…ĺi…ôs nu kanatar~…ĺ u an-di-s…ô-san-maj a buju Ē~ °an u nuwar~…ĺi kur~…ĺur~…ĺ a buju Ē~ °. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) kanańßatu i taj-piŇč-janńß i t…ôpan izaw ku ńßu-an-bij-bir~…ĺ-nan-an-suŇč-daw atu bu-ńßuo- ¶un-daw u nu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a subar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶aj a bińß ¶aan a ¶udad i ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a nu amisan a an-tuo-pa- ¶ij-s…ô-ta u **.* a ńßaw-mi, i s…ôn-di-ja-k…ô *** ńßaw-mi, ii nutimur~…ĺan ńßu-di-daw *,*** ńßaw-mi. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ******. makajsatipan pasajza katukuńß i war~…ĺian saajawaj u tanaja Ē~ °aj u r~…ĺik…ô ¶uaj a dadipasan, satu u bujubuju Ē~ °aj, satu u ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an. i t…ôpan u tar~…ĺakawaj u sakapańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °,tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺuk atu u pańßutinan. ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô atu bu-r~…ĺi-w…ô-ja atu arg…ôntina i r~…ĺir~…ĺi…ôs nu a-ti-s…ô-san-maj nu war~…ĺian a buju Ē~ °. kanańßatu i taj-piŇč-janńß i t…ôpan izaw ku ńßu-an-bij-bir~…ĺ-nan-an-suŇč-daw atu bu-ńßuo- ¶un-daw u nu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a subar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶aj a bińß ¶aan a ¶udad i ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a nu amisan a an-tuo-pa- ¶ij-s…ô-ta u **.* a ńßaw-mi, i s…ôn-di-ja-k…ô *** ńßaw-mi, ii nutimur~…ĺan ńßu-di-daw *,*** ńßaw-mi. pisup…ôt tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô pisup…ôt tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mar~…ĺa nu …ôurop…ô mabur~…ĺawaj nu a tad…ômaw nu babar~…ĺaki pur~…ĺuŇč tu r~…ĺisin nu iŇč-ti-an a tad…ômaw, misur~…ĺup tu nuwamisan a amir~…ĺikan a r~…ĺiain, satu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô ar~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶at nu tu kasakitakit a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nikamis…ôŇčis…ôŇči a ¶a. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) d…ômiad maawas ku ** wij-du ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, i ¶aj i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kakitizaan a ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kud…ômiad ujni a kanatar~…ĺ mibar~…ĺat maawas tu ** wij-du, satu ku i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kakitizaan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô pasujadańß masazumaaj a wajwaj nu bar~…ĺi, ¶aj ku sasakamuan mańßiniaj a d…ômiad nu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a kanadar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a tad…ômaw izaw ku **,***,*** a tad…ômaw, ujzasa **** a mińß ¶aan a zitajan a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶aaj tu kakatuud, ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a tad…ômaw u nika ¶unus mańßizatu ¶aaj kakatuud ku tad…ômaw, par~…ĺiajaw tu **** a mińß ¶aanaj a tad…ômaw a taŇčasa tu *,*** a baŇč,satusa a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw ¶aaj tu ka ¶unus ku tad…ômaw. ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô u katuudaj a bina ¶adan a sijkaj, patinaku tu mańßiniaj a kitakit kuudaj a kitakitaj a tad…ômaw jadańßaj a kitakitaj a mi ¶umutaj a tad…ômaw izaw ku**** atu nu ¶ana ¶ananan a mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj a izaŇč a nisakaputan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ** u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun: ***** u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika: ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô
S.FORM: Chile Chile Chile Chile kapulungan a kanatal "Spain a kamu u Rep√ļblica de Chile" ngangan tu Chile , u nutimulan a Amilikan a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ChileśôļŚą©ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Chile), .) u siwkay nu kanatal u Chile sa i labu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 30 00 S, 71 00 W u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 756,102 km2 u ahebal nu lalaay sa izaw ku 743,812 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 12,290 km2 hamin nu tademawan sa 17,650,114. kakalukan umah sa 21.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 21.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 57%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Santiago . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 18 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Sebasti√°n Pi√Īera (SaypasetianÔľéPiniyela Ś°ěŚ∑īśĖĮŤíāŚģČ¬∑Áöģś∂ÖśčČ), 12 bulad 1 demiad 1949 a mihca nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Chile ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihca 3 bulad 11 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Chile sa, u semilaway, u salengacay atu sumanahay. si salengacay a bunac i pabaw nu hata. Chile Chile kapulungan a kanatal "Spain a kamu u Rep√ļblica de Chile" ngangan tu Chile , u nutimulan a Amilika a kanatal. satipan u Chile atu timulan micapi waliyu nuwamisan micapi tu Peru , nuwalian micapi tu Bolivia ŚŹäArgentina . u nian a kanatal nutimulan a Amilikan a sakaput a kanatal, i nutimulan a Amilikan atu Argentina atu Brazil palecat "ABC icelayay a kanatal", caay kunian dada' , Chile atu Ecuador caay kahiza atu Brazil madatulas tu nutimulan a Amilikan a kanatal. (u sulit nu hulam: ChileśôļŚą©ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Chile), "ABCŚľ∑Śúč". .) Chile a kakitizaan i tini satimulan tu nu Amilikan a talu atu Nan-ciy-zuw uyza silaet dada' tu De-ley-ke a bayuan masapauwan, i kitakit u sakatimulanay a kanatal, pakay tu nu Nan-ciy-zuw a sakuwan caay ka saasip kunilalabu ,satu Chile a tademaw hinasakamu tuni uzipay a kanatal, " u sabataday nu hekal a kanatal" u tadamaw nu Chile pakala tu 1,800 mang, u nikasabinacadan u salengacay a tademaw katuud ku malamelay tu nu zumaay a binacadan, atu malecad tu zumaay Argentina a kanatal, nayay ku nu Africa a iluc a tademaw, u zuma u nianay tu yincumin atu cayay kakatuud a binacadan malecad tu kakatuud. (u sulit nu hulam: .) Chile a cacudadan talakaw macakat kunipasubana', atu pasubana' tu ni tineng atu singmung atu macakatay a kanatal, palatatenga' tuni u tineng atu mutesek tu tineng a kanatal, Chile i sakaku sanay a sinbung u ni kacakat u ni sasulitan kabuwah nu tedamaw, amin a kacakat, u ni pasilut tu ngangan, maala tu satalakaway atu nutimulan a Europe a kanatal masapaseneng tu salunganay, i tini i sakayay Chile u macakatay ku cin-ci tu nuamisan a Amilikan atu Europe a kanatal, tuynian katuud ku mabulaway a iluiluc nu Asia miawas tu waliyu mabulaw mueneng i Chile . (u sulit nu hulam: .) kamu nu cacudadan Si-ban-ya a dademaw Di-ke-de-luo-sa-lay-si a cudad izaw ku Chile a ngngan ,I tizaay a tademaw Indian a binacadan Ke-ciu-ya a kamu makay Incas a ngangan, sakamu sa kuheni "Chi-le" u kasinenawan a ngangan. u ngangan nu Chile hakay namakay i Yin-ciy-zen a tademaw, u imi sa, hadikuc nu Di-siw atu kanuma. (u sulit nu hulam: Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôšļļŤŅ≠śąą¬∑Śĺ∑¬∑ "Chile" "śąĖ"śĶ∑ť∑ó") Chile yadah kuni u lalaculan tu Kang-can buyubuyu'an u lalaculan atu mibutingay a lalaculan, Chile i kitakitan u Tung-kang a lalaculan u sayadahay nu kanatal, i kitakitan sayadahay nu kanatal ni patahekalan tu Tung si nganagn tu u kapahay a nganagn" Tung-kang a Hung-ti a kanatal", u zumasatu i lalabuay nu kanatal A-ta-ka-ma-sa-mu u sakakeladay i kitakit, uyni satu Chile uyza aca I kitakit uyzayamin nu tahakay yamin a sanicaway a Siaw-se-cuang a kanatal. saazihan tu laylay nu Chile nu amisan nu Chile i Spain mialaay katukuh I ayaw u tungusay nu In-ciy-di-ku ,namakay kasumamadan tu 16 a mihcaan, mulakal ku Spain a tademaw malingatu miala tu Chile 1541 a mihcaan patizeng tu tuze ku Sen-ti-ya-ke , tumulay a Ma-pu-ciye a tademaw saicelang sa mipacuy tu Spain a tademaw nu micumuday i tini katukuh i kasasumamadan tu 19 a mihcaan, kya mala u tungusay tu nu Chile a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) piazihan tulala' nu hekal Chile nu timulan nuwamisan a laet pakala tu 4,300 km, i tini An-di-se a buyu'an atu waliyu a bayuan, palalecal tu nu walian satipan a salaet 200 km dada' "u saahebalay pakala tu 400 km dada'", uynian a lala' nu kanatal azihan samapepet, mala u i kitakitay yamin u masatanayaay a kanatal, satu izaw kungangan kan lamaymay sanay kunipangangan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: "ÁĶ≤Śł∂Śúč"Á®ĪŤôü.) Chile malatulu a kenis : nuwamisan yadah ku buyu' yadah ku masaungcuyay buyu' pakala tu 6,000 a beti', i An-di-se-san-may a buyu'an tusa ku masakululay a buyu'an u tabukan nu A-ta-ka-ma a likelikenan, kuyni u masaacakay a kakitizaan nu kitakit,. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ) tepanay nu kanatal, u demiad mahiza u nu bayu'an a bali, uynian a kenis sidamek ku lala', katuud ku tademaw u kahenulan a tuse Sen-di-ya-ke "pakala tu 650 a mang ku nuenengay a tademaw i tini satusa izaw henay Wa-le-pa-lay-suo "i minatu nuenengay a tademaw pakala tu 280,000 ztu Kang-say-pa-si-weng " u tapang nu saupu nu kusi atu malukay akawaw i tiza nuengenay a tatemaw 50,000 u kahenulan a tusz. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) nutimulan satu caay kakatuud ku tademaw nikahina udad tabaki ku bali hina sawsawni makeleng, ayaw nu dadipasan yadah ku subal tu manganiway adihep. (u kamu nuHulam sa: .) makay satipan pasayza i sawalian saayaway u ma likecu a dadipasan, satu u buyu'an, satusa usaahebalay a buyu', I tepanay uyni u talakaway a buyu', sidabek kapah apalumaan atu pahutinan Chile atu Bolivia atu Argentina tu lilies nu kanatal u An-di-se-san-may a buyu'an u nuwali kulul a buyu'. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) kanahatu i Tay-ping-yanh I tepan izaw ku Hu-an-biy-bil-nan-an-sung-daw atu bu-huo-cun-daw u nu Chile a subal. cacay a bihcaan a cudad I Chile a nu amisan a An-tuo-pa-ciy-se-ta u 12.7 a haw-mi, i Sen-di-ya-ke 375 haw-mi, iI nutimulan Hu-di-daw 5,800 haw-mi. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 5800śĮęÁĪ≥. makaysatipan pasayza katukuh i walian saayaway u tanaya'ay u likecuay a dadipasan, satu u buyubuyu'ay, satu u ahebalay a buyubuyu'an. i tepan u talakaway u sakapahay a lala',taneng maluk atu u pahutinan. Chile atu Bu-li-wey-ya atu Argentina i lilies nu A-ti-se-san-may nu walian a buyu'. kanahatu i Tay-ping-yanh I tepan izaw ku Hu-an-biy-bil-nan-an-sung-daw atu bu-huo-cun-daw u nu Chile a subal. cacay a bihcaan a cudad I Chile a nu amisan a An-tuo-pa-ciy-se-ta u 12.7 a haw-mi, i Sen-di-ya-ke 375 haw-mi, iI nutimulan Hu-di-daw 5,800 haw-mi. pisupet tu lalangawan Chile pisupet tu lalangawan mala nu Europe mabulaway nu a tademaw nu babalaki pulung tu lisin nu Ing-ti-an a tademaw, misulup tu nuwamisan a Amilikan a liain, satu Chile alalangawan caay kalecat nu tu kasakitakit a lalangawan nikamisengisengi aca. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) demiad maawas ku 38 wiy-du ku lala', icay icuwacuwaay a kakitizaan a caay kalecad kudemiad uyni a kanatal mibalat maawas tu 38 wiy-du, satu ku icuwacuwaay a kakitizaan caay kalecad ku lala', Chile pasuyadah masazumaay a wayway nu bali, cay ku sasakamuan mahiniay a demiad nu Chile a kanadal. 2012 a mihcaan Chile a tademaw izaw ku 16,341,929 a tademaw, uyzasa 1990 a mihcaan a zitayan a nilecuhan caay tu kakatuud, Chile a tademaw u nikacunus mahizatu caay kakatuud ku tademaw, paliayaw tu 2050 a mihcaanay a tademaw a tangasa tu 2,020 a bang,satusa a tahekal a tademaw caay tu kacunus ku tademaw. Chile u katuuday a binacadan a siykay, patinaku tu mahiniay a kitakit kuuday a kitakitay a tademaw yadahay a kitakitay a micumutay a tademaw izaw kuŚćįÁ¨¨ŚģČšļļ atu nu canacananan a malamelay a izang a nisakaputan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: śôļŚą© u sulit nu Lipun: „ÉĀ„É™ŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilika: Chile
S.PHON: ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ "spain a kamu u *…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô" ŇčaŇčan tu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô , u nutimur~…ĺan a amir~…ĺikan a kanatar~…ĺ. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô*****(****:*…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô), .) u siwkaj nu kanatar~…ĺ u ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô sa i r~…ĺabu nu ¶oŇčnanm…ôi ¶o, itiza i ** ** s, ** ** w u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa izaw ku ***,*** km* u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa izaw ku **,*** km* ńßamin nu tad…ômawan sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **%. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u santiago . sapadat…ôŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad sapadat…ôŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad sa ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) ajza sa ¶i s…ôbasti*n pi*…ôra (sajpas…ôtian*pinij…ôr~…ĺa *********), ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô ajza, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u ńßata u kur~…ĺit nu ńßata nu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô sa, u s…ômir~…ĺawaj, u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj atu sumanańßaj. si sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a buna ¶ i pabaw nu ńßata. ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ "spain a kamu u *…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô" ŇčaŇčan tu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô , u nutimur~…ĺan a amir~…ĺika a kanatar~…ĺ. satipan u ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô atu timur~…ĺan mi ¶api war~…ĺiju nuwamisan mi ¶api tu p…ôru , nuwar~…ĺian mi ¶api tu bor~…ĺi*ia *arg…ôntina . u nian a kanatar~…ĺ nutimur~…ĺan a amir~…ĺikan a sakaput a kanatar~…ĺ, i nutimur~…ĺan a amir~…ĺikan atu arg…ôntina atu brazir~…ĺ par~…ĺ…ô ¶at "ab ¶ i ¶…ôr~…ĺajaj a kanatar~…ĺ", ¶aaj kunian dada Ē~ ° , ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô atu …ô ¶uador ¶aaj kańßiza atu brazir~…ĺ madatur~…ĺas tu nutimur~…ĺan a amir~…ĺikan a kanatar~…ĺ. (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô*****(****:*…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ô ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô), "ab ¶**". .) ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a kakitizaan i tini satimur~…ĺan tu nu amir~…ĺikan a tar~…ĺu atu nan- ¶ij-zuw ujza sir~…ĺa…ôt dada Ē~ ° tu d…ô-r~…ĺ…ô-k…ô a bajuan masapauwan, i kitakit u sakatimur~…ĺanaj a kanatar~…ĺ, pakaj tu nu nan- ¶ij-zuw a sakuwan ¶aaj ka saasip kunir~…ĺar~…ĺabu ,satu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a tad…ômaw ńßinasakamu tuni uzipaj a kanatar~…ĺ, " u sabatadaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ" u tadamaw nu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** maŇč, u nikasabina ¶adan u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw katuud ku mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj tu nu zumaaj a bina ¶adan, atu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu zumaaj arg…ôntina a kanatar~…ĺ, najaj ku nu afri ¶a a ir~…ĺu ¶ a tad…ômaw, u zuma u nianaj tu jin ¶umin atu ¶ajaj kakatuud a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kakatuud. (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a ¶a ¶udadan tar~…ĺakaw ma ¶akat kunipasubana Ē~ °, atu pasubana Ē~ ° tu ni tin…ôŇč atu siŇčmuŇč atu ma ¶akataj a kanatar~…ĺ, par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tuni u tin…ôŇč atu mut…ôs…ôk tu tin…ôŇč a kanatar~…ĺ, ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô i sakaku sanaj a sinbuŇč u ni ka ¶akat u ni sasur~…ĺitan kabuwańß nu t…ôdamaw, amin a ka ¶akat, u ni pasir~…ĺut tu ŇčaŇčan, maar~…ĺa tu satar~…ĺakawaj atu nutimur~…ĺan a …ôurop…ô a kanatar~…ĺ masapas…ôn…ôŇč tu sar~…ĺuŇčanaj, i tini i sakajaj ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô u ma ¶akataj ku ¶in- ¶i tu nuamisan a amir~…ĺikan atu …ôurop…ô a kanatar~…ĺ, tujnian katuud ku mabur~…ĺawaj a ir~…ĺuir~…ĺu ¶ nu asia miawas tu war~…ĺiju mabur~…ĺaw mu…ôn…ôŇč i ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô . (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kamu nu ¶a ¶udadan si-ban-ja a dad…ômaw di-k…ô-d…ô-r~…ĺuo-sa-r~…ĺaj-si a ¶udad izaw ku ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô a ŇčŇčan ,i tizaaj a tad…ômaw indian a bina ¶adan k…ô- ¶iu-ja a kamu makaj in ¶as a ŇčaŇčan, sakamu sa kuńß…ôni " ¶ńßi-r~…ĺ…ô" u kasin…ônawan a ŇčaŇčan. u ŇčaŇčan nu ¶ńßir~…ĺ…ô ńßakaj namakaj i jin- ¶ij-z…ôn a tad…ômaw, u imi sa, ńßadiku ¶ nu di-siw atu kanuma.
